name: Purple Plum Chiffon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash, halve, and pit the plums.
2. Place in a large saucepan with 1/4 cup water.
3. Cover and simmer over low heat until tender, about 10 minutes.
4. Puree the plum pulp and liquid in a blender.
5. Measure 2 cups puree, adding water if necessary.
6. Add sugar and lemon juice; stir until sugar is dissolved.
7. Soften gelatin in 1/4 cup cold water, then dissolve over hot water.
8. Chill until slightly thickened.
9. Beat egg whites with salt until stiff but not dry.
10. Fold egg whites and whipped cream into the plum mixture.
11. Pile into pastry shell.
12. Chill until firm.
13. Garnish with whipped cream if desired.
Makes 1 - 9-inch pie.
